name: Can I be forced to take a polygraph test for my workers comp claim?
description: No. Polygraphs aren't admissible in workers comp hearings. Never agree to one—it's a scare tactic.

mainEntity.name: Can I be forced to take a polygraph test for my workers comp claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. Polygraphs aren't admissible in workers comp hearings. Never agree to one—it's a scare tactic.
